channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump's "I Like Her" Remark On Meloni Amid Spat, Then A 'No Help' Complaint

media:content.media:description: Trump said Meloni made a "mistake" by not getting involved in operations in the Strait of Hormuz

item.description: During a meeting with Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan, when a reporter asked Trump to clarify his social media post regarding the 'restraining order' post on Meloni, the US President said, "We had a bad relationship. It became a little bad because she refused to help us."
item.content:encoded: During a meeting with Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan, when a reporter asked Trump to clarify his social media post regarding the 'restraining order' post on Meloni, the US President said, "We had a bad relationship. It became a little bad because she refused to help us."

item.title: "It's A Great Plane": Trump Says US Will Consider Selling F-35 Jets To Turkey

media:content.media:description: Erdogan said he was confident Trump would resolve the issue and end the dispute.

item.description: Turkey has long sought to resolve the question of its readmittance to the F35 programme and the lifting of US sanctions that have soured ties and hampered Turkish defence projects, and has looked to Trump's visit to break the deadlock.
item.content:encoded: Turkey has long sought to resolve the question of its readmittance to the F35 programme and the lifting of US sanctions that have soured ties and hampered Turkish defence projects, and has looked to Trump's visit to break the deadlock.

item.title: 3 Tankers Attacked In Strait Of Hormuz In 24 Hours Amid US-Iran Ceasefire

media:content.media:description: The second tanker sustained structural damage when it was hit, but no one was injured (File photo)

item.description: One of the tankers caught fire after being attacked while travelling off the coast of Oman. Although theIranian state television said the liquefied natural gas tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings, it did not directly claim the assault.
item.content:encoded: One of the tankers caught fire after being attacked while travelling off the coast of Oman. Although theIranian state television said the liquefied natural gas tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings, it did not directly claim the assault.

item.title: Bangladesh Wants To Strengthen Ties With India: PM Rahman's Top Adviser

media:content.media:description: Zahed Ur Rahman has made it clear that Bangladesh wants to improve India ties

item.description: Speaking on whether he will visit India after the incident at the airport, Zahed Ur Rahman said, "I will certainly go. I am making this very clear that if I receive a proper invitation, I will certainly go because I want to engage with India, logically and rationally."
item.content:encoded: Speaking on whether he will visit India after the incident at the airport, Zahed Ur Rahman said, "I will certainly go. I am making this very clear that if I receive a proper invitation, I will certainly go because I want to engage with India, logically and rationally."

item.title: Woman Suspected Of Monaco Bombing Shot Dead Near Kyiv, 2 Officials Arrested

media:content.media:description: The two men accused of killing her have been arrested in connection with the case.

item.description: Anastasiia Berezovska, 39, was shot dead when her body was found in Ukraine, police said.
item.content:encoded: Anastasiia Berezovska, 39, was shot dead when her body was found in Ukraine, police said.

item.title: El Nino Expected 'To Break Records' In Strength And Extremity, Expert Warns
item.description: This year's El Nino is unlike anything he had seen in more than three decades of tracking the phenomenon, said El Nino expert Tim Stockdale.
item.content:encoded: This year's El Nino is unlike anything he had seen in more than three decades of tracking the phenomenon, said El Nino expert Tim Stockdale.

item.title: BrahMos, EVMs And Sabang Masterstroke As India And Indonesia Team Up

media:content.media:description: Indonesia is looking to buy India's BrahMos cruise missile

item.description: Sabang overlooks the northern entrance of the Strait of Malacca, which is one of the world's busiest maritime highways
item.content:encoded: Sabang overlooks the northern entrance of the Strait of Malacca, which is one of the world's busiest maritime highways

item.title: Ukraine Strikes 8 Russian 'Shadow Fleet' Tankers Delivering Fuel To Crimea

media:content.media:description: Ukrainian drones strikes tankers from Russia. (Representational Image)

item.description: Ukraine's drone forces said they had struck the vessels - each under international sanctions and with a deadweight of around 7,000 tons - in the Sea of Azov.
item.content:encoded: Ukraine's drone forces said they had struck the vessels - each under international sanctions and with a deadweight of around 7,000 tons - in the Sea of Azov.

item.title: China Storms Kill 15, Trigger Evacuations, Xi Jingping Orders Rescue Effort

media:content.media:description: Rescue workers in life vests searched for missing people in inflatable boats. (Representational Image)

item.description: Severe storms and flooding kill at least 15 people across China, displacing tens of thousands
item.content:encoded: Severe storms and flooding kill at least 15 people across China, displacing tens of thousands

item.title: Israel, Lebanon To Hold Direct US-Mediated Talks In Rome Next Week

media:content.media:description: Hezbollah draws Lebanon into the regional war on March 2.

item.description: This round of talks will be the sixth since spring between the two neighbours, which do not have diplomatic relations and are technically in a state of war.
item.content:encoded: This round of talks will be the sixth since spring between the two neighbours, which do not have diplomatic relations and are technically in a state of war.

item.title: "No Country Should Be Worried": Bangladesh PM's Adviser On Teesta Project

media:content.media:description: India has been open about its concerns on the project, Randhir Jaiswal said

item.description: Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman's Information and Broadcasting Adviser Zahed Ur Rahman has said no other country should be worried about the Teesta River Comprehensive Management and Restoration Project.
item.content:encoded: Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman's Information and Broadcasting Adviser Zahed Ur Rahman has said no other country should be worried about the Teesta River Comprehensive Management and Restoration Project.

item.title: PM Modi Receives Indonesia's Highest Honour 'Bintang Adipurna' In Jakarta

media:content.media:description: Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto presented the medal to PM Modi.

item.description: External Affairs Ministry spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal said that the award is a "tribute to the India-Indonesia friendship."
item.content:encoded: External Affairs Ministry spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal said that the award is a "tribute to the India-Indonesia friendship."

item.title: Roof Collapse At New Jersey Store Amid Heavy Flooding, No Injuries Reported

media:content.media:description: According to authorities no one was injured.

item.description: Ocean Township Sheriff Shaun Golden said the incident served as yet another reminder that severe weather can rapidly turn dangerous.
item.content:encoded: Ocean Township Sheriff Shaun Golden said the incident served as yet another reminder that severe weather can rapidly turn dangerous.

item.title: Snake Triggers Overnight Power Outage Affecting Thousands In Virginia
item.description: Dominion Energy spokesperson Craig Carper said that the snake's contact with the equipment activated an automatic safety shutdown.
item.content:encoded: Dominion Energy spokesperson Craig Carper said that the snake's contact with the equipment activated an automatic safety shutdown.

item.title: She Was Told Her Mammogram Was 'Clear'. Now, She Has Stage 4 Breast Cancer And A $7 Million Verdict

media:content.media:description: Eight months later, the lump had grown larger and become painful.

item.description: A diagnostic mammogram and ultrasound were reviewed by radiologist Henry Lusane, who reportedly informed her that the scans showed nothing concerning.
item.content:encoded: A diagnostic mammogram and ultrasound were reviewed by radiologist Henry Lusane, who reportedly informed her that the scans showed nothing concerning.

item.title: Video: Sea Of Black And Red On Qom Streets As Iran Mourns Khamenei's Killing

media:content.media:description: So far, there has been no sign of Mojtaba Khamenei at the events

item.description: Videos from the country showed mourners, including clerics wearing turbans, paying their respects at the coffins of Khamenei and four relatives killed alongside him, including a granddaughter reportedly only 14 months old.
item.content:encoded: Videos from the country showed mourners, including clerics wearing turbans, paying their respects at the coffins of Khamenei and four relatives killed alongside him, including a granddaughter reportedly only 14 months old.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | America, Trump, And The Politics Of Belonging In A Connected World
item.description: Many commentators view the current debate as another chapter in Donald Trump's political story. That explanation is incomplete.
item.content:encoded: Many commentators view the current debate as another chapter in Donald Trump's political story. That explanation is incomplete.

item.title: "Golden Chapter In Ties": PM Modi Unveils Ambitious India-Indonesia Agenda

media:content.media:description: Indonesia's President Prabowo Subianto welcomed PM Narendra Modi

item.description: A key focus of the discussions was strengthening defence and maritime cooperation. PM Modi said both sides had agreed to expand defence exchanges, disaster management cooperation and industrial collaboration.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1123827/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>A key focus of the discussions was strengthening defence and maritime cooperation. PM Modi said both sides had agreed to expand defence exchanges, disaster management cooperation and industrial collaboration.

item.title: Video: Blast Near French President Macron's Damascus Hotel During Syria Visit

media:content.media:description: The Elysee said the blasts were not audible from the presidential motorcade

item.description: Explosions near Macron's Damascus hotel highlighted the massive security challenges facing Syria under its new post-Assad leadership.
item.content:encoded: Explosions near Macron's Damascus hotel highlighted the massive security challenges facing Syria under its new post-Assad leadership.

item.title: Gunmen Kill 9 Cops At Dam Project Checkpost In Pakistan's Balochistan

media:content.media:description: Gunmen kill 9 police officers near dam project in southwest Pakistan (Representational)

item.description: Militants in Balochistan ambushed a security post at the Mangi Dam, killing nine officers as region-wide infrastructure attacks intensify.
item.content:encoded: Militants in Balochistan ambushed a security post at the Mangi Dam, killing nine officers as region-wide infrastructure attacks intensify.
